title: Google Upgrades Gemini Enterprise: Optimizing Interface and Advancing Workspace Connector Redesign
excerpt: Google is advancing the next round of updates for its enterprise AI assistant, Gemini Enterprise. The platform's main prompt bar now features a vibrant visual d
content_html:
Google is advancing the next round of updates for its enterprise AI assistant, Gemini Enterprise. The platform's main prompt bar now features a vibrant visual design consistent with the consumer version of the Gemini app, further unifying the product experience for both enterprise and individual users. This change also reflects Google's desire to align its enterprise AI assistant with the Gemini ecosystem used by hundreds of millions of users.

The more notable aspect of this update is the upgrade of the Google Workspace connector. Some users have received notifications stating that after the connector update, they may need to reauthorize to continue using it. Although Google has not yet disclosed specific technical details, this adjustment may involve expanded permissions or underlying architecture optimization.

In recent years, Gemini Enterprise has continuously expanded its enterprise data connectivity capabilities, and now supports various office tools such as Slack, Microsoft Teams, Notion, Linear, Jira, and ServiceNow, and gradually adds capabilities such as creating pages and updating tickets. The optimization of the connector architecture will directly affect the AI assistant's ability to read enterprise data, perform tasks, and call external services.

Additionally, the intelligent agent feature called Gemini Spark, announced by Google during the May I/O conference, has now appeared in the settings of Gemini Enterprise, but remains hidden. Google stated that Spark will be made available to enterprise customers in the future and can perform background tasks through connectors such as SharePoint, OneDrive, and ServiceNow.

Industry observers believe that this Gemini Enterprise update is not just a simple interface adjustment, but rather infrastructure development for expanding enterprise-level AI agent capabilities. As enterprise AI assistants gradually move from information queries to task execution, data connectivity, security permissions, and system compatibility will become key factors in determining the product's practical effectiveness.

sentences.en: This change also reflects Google's desire to align its enterprise AI assistant with the Gemini ecosystem used by hundreds of millions of users.
sentences.zh: 这一变化也反映出谷歌希望将其企业人工智能助手与数亿用户使用的 Gemini 生态系统结合起来。

Although Google has not yet disclosed specific technical details, this adjustment may involve expanded permissions or underlying architecture optimization.

sentences.zh: 近年来，Gemini Enterprise不断拓展企业数据连接能力，现已支持Slack、Microsoft Teams、Notion、Linear、Jira、ServiceNow等多种办公工具，并逐步增加创建页面、更新工单等功能。

sentences.en: The optimization of the connector architecture will directly affect the AI assistant's ability to read enterprise data, perform tasks, and call external services.
sentences.zh: 连接器架构的优化将直接影响AI助手读取企业数据、执行任务、调用外部服务的能力。

sentences.zh: 此外，谷歌在 5 月 I/O 大会上宣布的名为 Gemini Spark 的智能代理功能现已出现在 Gemini Enterprise 的设置中，但仍处于隐藏状态。

sentences.en: Google stated that Spark will be made available to enterprise customers in the future and can perform background tasks through connectors such as SharePoint, OneDrive, and ServiceNow.
sentences.zh: 谷歌表示，Spark未来将提供给企业客户，可以通过SharePoint、OneDrive和ServiceNow等连接器执行后台任务。

As enterprise AI assistants gradually move from information queries to task execution, data connectivity, security permissions, and system compatibility will become key factors in determining the product's practical effectiveness.

sentences.zh: 行业观察人士认为，本次Gemini Enterprise更新不仅仅是简单的界面调整，而是为扩展企业级AI代理能力而进行的基础设施开发。

sentences.en: As enterprise AI assistants gradually move from information queries to task execution, data connectivity, security permissions, and system compatibility will become key factors in determining the product's practical effectiveness.
sentences.zh: 随着企业AI助手逐渐从信息查询转向任务执行，数据连通性、安全权限、系统兼容性将成为决定产品实际效果的关键因素。

content_html_zh:
谷歌正在推进其企业人工智能助手 Gemini Enterprise 的下一轮更新。 该平台的主提示栏现在采用了与消费版Gemini应用程序一致的充满活力的视觉设计，进一步统一了企业和个人用户的产品体验。 这一变化也反映出谷歌希望将其企业人工智能助手与数亿用户使用的 Gemini 生态系统结合起来。

本次更新比较引人注目的方面是 Google Workspace 连接器的升级。 一些用户收到通知，指出连接器更新后，他们可能需要重新授权才能继续使用它。 虽然谷歌尚未透露具体的技术细节，但此次调整可能涉及权限扩大或底层架构优化。

近年来，Gemini Enterprise不断拓展企业数据连接能力，现已支持Slack、Microsoft Teams、Notion、Linear、Jira、ServiceNow等多种办公工具，并逐步增加创建页面、更新工单等功能。 连接器架构的优化将直接影响AI助手读取企业数据、执行任务、调用外部服务的能力。

此外，谷歌在 5 月 I/O 大会上宣布的名为 Gemini Spark 的智能代理功能现已出现在 Gemini Enterprise 的设置中，但仍处于隐藏状态。 谷歌表示，Spark未来将提供给企业客户，可以通过SharePoint、OneDrive和ServiceNow等连接器执行后台任务。

行业观察人士认为，本次Gemini Enterprise更新不仅仅是简单的界面调整，而是为扩展企业级AI代理能力而进行的基础设施开发。 随着企业AI助手逐渐从信息查询转向任务执行，数据连通性、安全权限、系统兼容性将成为决定产品实际效果的关键因素。
